title: Dynamic Aggregation of Data for Selected Board Items
excerpt: I propose a feature that enables the display of aggregated data such as sums and averages for selected items on a board. This would allow for instant calculations directly from the selection, presented in a dynamic float…

posts.author: yanivgr (Yaniv Gershon)
posts.cookedHtml: I propose a feature that enables the display of aggregated data such as sums and averages for selected items on a board. This would allow for instant calculations directly from the selection, presented in a dynamic floating panel. This enhancement aims to streamline workflows and improve decision-making processes by providing immediate insights tailored to user-selected items.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Yaniv,
Do you mean somthing like pivot table functionality? Could you please elaborate a bit on how you see this dynamic panel? And iy whould be also awesome to know your use case for this (what you try to achieve). Freely reach out to me, maybe, we’ll have solution for you ibelaya@stiltsoft.com
